75.reason: [The root is initialized with -1 as a placeholder, but this causes incorrect height calculation for the first inserted node and may lead to logical errors when -1 is part of actual input. Also, the height of the root should be 1, but it's never set.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The root is initialized with -1 as a placeholder, but this causes incorrect height calculation for the first inserted node and may lead to logical errors when -1 is part of actual input. Also, the height of the root should be 1, but it's never set.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  // The root is initialized with -1 as a placeholder, but this causes incorrect height calculation for the first real node and breaks BST logic when actual data includes -1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The root is initialized with value -1, which may interfere if -1 is a valid input. More critically, the height of the root is never set, so leaf nodes that are the root will print uninitialized height.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [The root is initialized with -1 as a placeholder, but this causes incorrect height calculation for the first real node. Also, if the input contains -1, it will be treated as already present in the tree, leading to logical errors. The reference program does not use such a sentinel value.]
